title: Hooks Changes Collection
description: React data hooks for **Hooks Changes Collection**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.
context: React data hooks for **Hooks Changes Collection**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.

rules.requirement: hooks load change lists through port-changes-collection
rules: The hooks MUST call `listChanges`, `listDrafts`, `listDiscarded`, `listArchived`, and `detectOverlaps` on `client:port-changes-collection`.

rules.requirement: hooks refresh change lists on global poll
rules: On each global poll tick, sidebar lists MUST refresh so agent-created, shelved, or discarded changes appear without manual reload.

scenarios.requirement: hooks load change lists through port-changes-collection
scenarios.name: Sidebar hooks call list methods
then: listChanges, listDrafts, listDiscarded, listArchived are invoked
AND results render in sidebar sections

scenarios.requirement: hooks load change lists through port-changes-collection
scenarios.name: Global poll refreshes lists
then: AND new agent-created change appears without reload

scenarios.requirement: hooks load change lists through port-changes-collection
scenarios.name: Overlap detection surfaces warnings
then: AND user can inspect conflicting changes

scenarios.requirement: hooks refresh change lists on global poll
scenarios.name: Global poll triggers list refetch

scenarios.requirement: hooks refresh change lists on global poll
scenarios.name: Poll paused when window blurred

scenarios.requirement: hooks refresh change lists on global poll
scenarios.name: New change appears after external edit
